---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the limitation or gap you've encountered.

**Proposed solution**
Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.

**Additional context**
Screenshots, links to similar projects, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
